ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: sugar, glucose syrup, wheat flour (17%), palm fat, cocoa butter, skimmed milk powder, cocoa mass, lactose, milk fat, whey powder (from milk), fat reduced cocoa, salt, emulsifier (soya lecithin), raising agent (e500), natural vanilla extract. may contain hazelnuts and almonds.
